mapper.select:
/*canPpTransferMapper.getTmntPpCntrList*/
SELECT A.CONTRACT_NUM AS contractNum , A.CUSTOMER_ID AS customerId , A.BAN AS ban , A.SVC_CNTR_NO AS svcCntrNo , A.SUBSCRIBER_NO AS subscriberNo FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO A , PPS_CUSTOMER B WHERE A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM AND A.SUB_STATUS = 'C' AND TO_DATE(SUBSTR(A.SUB_STATUS_DATE, 1, 8), 'YYYYMMDD') <= TRUNC(SYSDATE) - #{stdrCnt} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM PPS_CUSTOMER@DL_CAN WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = A.CONTRACT_NUM ) AND ROWNUM <= (SELECT ETC1 FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'DEV0003' AND CD_VAL = 'CAN_PP_TRANS_CNT')

/*canPpTransferMapper.getRcgRmoteReqLogList*/
SELECT A.REQ_SEQ, TO_CHAR(A.IN_REQ_DATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') IN_REQ_DT FROM PPS_RCG_REMOTE_REQ_LOG A WHERE TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(IN_REQ_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYYMMDD') <= TRUNC(SYSDATE) - #{stdrCnt} AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM PPS_RCG_REMOTE_REQ_LOG@DL_CAN WHERE REQ_SEQ = A.REQ_SEQ AND TO_CHAR(IN_REQ_DATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') = TO_CHAR(A.IN_REQ_DATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'))
mapper.insert: /*canPpTransferMapper.insertCanPpsCustomer*/ INSERT INTO PPS_CUSTOMER@DL_CAN ( CONTRACT_NUM, SOC, SERVICE_TYPE, ENTER_DATE, STATUS_STOP_DT, STATUS_STOP_CD, STATUS_CANCEL_DT, STATUS_CANCEL_CD, BASIC_REMAINS, BASIC_EXPIRE, BASIC_EMPT_DT, VOICE_RATE, DATA_REG, DATA_REG_DT, DATA_MODE, DATA_SERVICE_CODE, DATA_QUOTA, DATA_QUOTA_REMAINS, DATA_VA_REMAINS, DATA_EXPIRE, DATA_LIMIT, LAST_KT_IN_MODE, LAST_KT_SYN_DT, LAST_BASIC_CHG_DT, LAST_DATA_CHG_DT, POINT, POINT_LAST_DT, US_LC_VOICE, US_LC_SMS, US_LC_DATA, US_LC_LAST_DATE, TOTAL_POINT, TOTAL_BASIC_CHG, TOTAL_BASIC_CNT, TOTAL_DATA_CHG, TOTAL_DATA_CNT, RECHARGE_FLAG, RECHARGE_FLAG_DT, SMS_PHONE, SMS_FLAG, RENTAL_STATUS, RENTAL_DT, VIR_ACCOUNT_ID, CMS_CHARGE_TYPE, CMS_BANK_CODE, CMS_ACCOUNT, CMS_USER_NAME, CMS_USER_SSN, CMS_CHARGE, CMS_TRY_REMAINS, CMS_CHARGE_DATE, CMS_CHARGE_MONTH, PAPER_IMAGE_1, PAPER_IMAGE_2, PAPER_IMAGE_3, PAPER_IMAGE_4, PAPER_IMAGE_5, AD_NAME, AD_SSN, AD_ADDRESS, AD_NATION, LANG_CODE, WWW_REG_FLAG, WWW_REG_DT, AGENT_ID, AGENT_CH_DT, ADMIN_ID, ADMIN_CH_DT, REMARK, AGENT_SALE_ID, AGENT_SALE_ADMIN, AGENT_SALE_DATE, AGNT_DP_RCG_FLAG, AGNT_DP_RCG_REMAINS, AGNT_DP_RCG_CHARGE, RECHARGE_FLAG_ADMIN, SO_CD, AGNT_DP_RCG_CNT, AGNT_DP_RCG_NOW_CNT, VIZA_FLAG, STAY_EXPIR_DT, MVNO_BASIC_EXPIRE ) SELECT CONTRACT_NUM, SOC, SERVICE_TYPE, ENTER_DATE, STATUS_STOP_DT, STATUS_STOP_CD, STATUS_CANCEL_DT, STATUS_CANCEL_CD, BASIC_REMAINS, BASIC_EXPIRE, BASIC_EMPT_DT, VOICE_RATE, DATA_REG, DATA_REG_DT, DATA_MODE, DATA_SERVICE_CODE, DATA_QUOTA, DATA_QUOTA_REMAINS, DATA_VA_REMAINS, DATA_EXPIRE, DATA_LIMIT, LAST_KT_IN_MODE, LAST_KT_SYN_DT, LAST_BASIC_CHG_DT, LAST_DATA_CHG_DT, POINT, POINT_LAST_DT, US_LC_VOICE, US_LC_SMS, US_LC_DATA, US_LC_LAST_DATE, TOTAL_POINT, TOTAL_BASIC_CHG, TOTAL_BASIC_CNT, TOTAL_DATA_CHG, TOTAL_DATA_CNT, RECHARGE_FLAG, RECHARGE_FLAG_DT, SMS_PHONE, SMS_FLAG, RENTAL_STATUS, RENTAL_DT, VIR_ACCOUNT_ID, CMS_CHARGE_TYPE, CMS_BANK_CODE, CMS_ACCOUNT, CMS_USER_NAME, CMS_USER_SSN, CMS_CHARGE, CMS_TRY_REMAINS, CMS_CHARGE_DATE, CMS_CHARGE_MONTH, PAPER_IMAGE_1, PAPER_IMAGE_2, PAPER_IMAGE_3, PAPER_IMAGE_4, PAPER_IMAGE_5, AD_NAME, AD_SSN, AD_ADDRESS, AD_NATION, LANG_CODE, WWW_REG_FLAG, WWW_REG_DT, AGENT_ID, AGENT_CH_DT, ADMIN_ID, ADMIN_CH_DT, REMARK, AGENT_SALE_ID, AGENT_SALE_ADMIN, AGENT_SALE_DATE, AGNT_DP_RCG_FLAG, AGNT_DP_RCG_REMAINS, AGNT_DP_RCG_CHARGE, RECHARGE_FLAG_ADMIN, SO_CD, AGNT_DP_RCG_CNT, AGNT_DP_RCG_NOW_CNT, VIZA_FLAG, STAY_EXPIR_DT, MVNO_BASIC_EXPIRE FROM PPS_CUSTOMER A WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM PPS_CUSTOMER@DL_CAN WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = A.CONTRACT_NUM )

/*canPpTransferMapper.insertCanPpsCustomerHist*/ INSERT INTO PPS_CUSTOMER_HIST@DL_CAN ( CONTRACT_NUM, SOC, SERVICE_TYPE, ENTER_DATE, STATUS_STOP_DT, STATUS_STOP_CD, STATUS_CANCEL_DT, STATUS_CANCEL_CD, BASIC_REMAINS, BASIC_EXPIRE, BASIC_EMPT_DT, VOICE_RATE, DATA_REG, DATA_REG_DT, DATA_MODE, DATA_SERVICE_CODE, DATA_QUOTA, DATA_QUOTA_REMAINS, DATA_VA_REMAINS, DATA_EXPIRE, DATA_LIMIT, LAST_KT_IN_MODE, LAST_KT_SYN_DT, LAST_BASIC_CHG_DT, LAST_DATA_CHG_DT, POINT, POINT_LAST_DT, US_LC_VOICE, US_LC_SMS, US_LC_DATA, US_LC_LAST_DATE, TOTAL_POINT, TOTAL_BASIC_CHG, TOTAL_BASIC_CNT, TOTAL_DATA_CHG, TOTAL_DATA_CNT, RECHARGE_FLAG, RECHARGE_FLAG_DT, SMS_PHONE, SMS_FLAG, RENTAL_STATUS, RENTAL_DT, VIR_ACCOUNT_ID, CMS_CHARGE_TYPE, CMS_BANK_CODE, CMS_ACCOUNT, CMS_USER_NAME, CMS_USER_SSN, CMS_CHARGE, CMS_TRY_REMAINS, CMS_CHARGE_DATE, CMS_CHARGE_MONTH, PAPER_IMAGE_1, PAPER_IMAGE_2, PAPER_IMAGE_3, PAPER_IMAGE_4, PAPER_IMAGE_5, AD_NAME, AD_SSN, AD_ADDRESS, AD_NATION, LANG_CODE, WWW_REG_FLAG, WWW_REG_DT, AGENT_ID, AGENT_CH_DT, ADMIN_ID, ADMIN_CH_DT, REMARK, AGENT_SALE_ID, AGENT_SALE_ADMIN, AGENT_SALE_DATE, AGNT_DP_RCG_FLAG, AGNT_DP_RCG_REMAINS, AGNT_DP_RCG_CHARGE, RECHARGE_FLAG_ADMIN, HIST_DT, HIST_ADMIN, HIST_CODE, AGNT_DP_RCG_CNT, AGNT_DP_RCG_NOW_CNT, VIZA_FLAG, STAY_EXPIR_DT, MVNO_BASIC_EXPIRE ) SELECT CONTRACT_NUM, SOC, SERVICE_TYPE, ENTER_DATE, STATUS_STOP_DT, STATUS_STOP_CD, STATUS_CANCEL_DT, STATUS_CANCEL_CD, BASIC_REMAINS, BASIC_EXPIRE, BASIC_EMPT_DT, VOICE_RATE, DATA_REG, DATA_REG_DT, DATA_MODE, DATA_SERVICE_CODE, DATA_QUOTA, DATA_QUOTA_REMAINS, DATA_VA_REMAINS, DATA_EXPIRE, DATA_LIMIT, LAST_KT_IN_MODE, LAST_KT_SYN_DT, LAST_BASIC_CHG_DT, LAST_DATA_CHG_DT, POINT, POINT_LAST_DT, US_LC_VOICE, US_LC_SMS, US_LC_DATA, US_LC_LAST_DATE, TOTAL_POINT, TOTAL_BASIC_CHG, TOTAL_BASIC_CNT, TOTAL_DATA_CHG, TOTAL_DATA_CNT, RECHARGE_FLAG, RECHARGE_FLAG_DT, SMS_PHONE, SMS_FLAG, RENTAL_STATUS, RENTAL_DT, VIR_ACCOUNT_ID, CMS_CHARGE_TYPE, CMS_BANK_CODE, CMS_ACCOUNT, CMS_USER_NAME, CMS_USER_SSN, CMS_CHARGE, CMS_TRY_REMAINS, CMS_CHARGE_DATE, CMS_CHARGE_MONTH, PAPER_IMAGE_1, PAPER_IMAGE_2, PAPER_IMAGE_3, PAPER_IMAGE_4, PAPER_IMAGE_5, AD_NAME, AD_SSN, AD_ADDRESS, AD_NATION, LANG_CODE, WWW_REG_FLAG, WWW_REG_DT, AGENT_ID, AGENT_CH_DT, ADMIN_ID, ADMIN_CH_DT, REMARK, AGENT_SALE_ID, AGENT_SALE_ADMIN, AGENT_SALE_DATE, AGNT_DP_RCG_FLAG, AGNT_DP_RCG_REMAINS, AGNT_DP_RCG_CHARGE, RECHARGE_FLAG_ADMIN, HIST_DT, HIST_ADMIN, HIST_CODE, AGNT_DP_RCG_CNT, AGNT_DP_RCG_NOW_CNT, VIZA_FLAG, STAY_EXPIR_DT, MVNO_BASIC_EXPIRE FROM PPS_CUSTOMER_HIST A WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM PPS_CUSTOMER_HIST@DL_CAN WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = A.CONTRACT_NUM )

/*canPpTransferMapper.insertCanPpsAgentStmOpen*/ INSERT INTO PPS_AGENT_STM_OPEN@DL_CAN ( CONTRACT_NUM, CUSTOMER_ID, SUBSCRIBER_NO, SUB_LINK_NAME, USER_SSN, ENTER_DATE, CUST_IDNT_NO_IND_CD, SOC, ONOFF, OVERLAP_STATUS, SUB_STATUS_1, SUB_STATUS_15, AGENT_ID_1, AGENT_ID_15, AGENT_SALE_ID_1, AGENT_SALE_ID_15, MODEL_FLAG_15, DATA_TYPE_1, DOC_CNT_1, REFUND_FLAG, REFUND_DT, REFUND_RSN, REFUND_ADMIN, MNP_GUBUN ) SELECT CONTRACT_NUM, CUSTOMER_ID, SUBSCRIBER_NO, SUB_LINK_NAME, USER_SSN, ENTER_DATE, CUST_IDNT_NO_IND_CD, SOC, ONOFF, OVERLAP_STATUS, SUB_STATUS_1, SUB_STATUS_15, AGENT_ID_1, AGENT_ID_15, AGENT_SALE_ID_1, AGENT_SALE_ID_15, MODEL_FLAG_15, DATA_TYPE_1, DOC_CNT_1, REFUND_FLAG, REFUND_DT, REFUND_RSN, REFUND_ADMIN, MNP_GUBUN FROM PPS_AGENT_STM_OPEN A WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM PPS_AGENT_STM_OPEN@DL_CAN WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = A.CONTRACT_NUM )

/*canPpTransferMapper.insertCanPpsRcgRealCms*/ INSERT INTO PPS_RCG_REAL_CMS@DL_CAN ( CMS_SEQ, REQ_DATE, REQ_NO, RES_CODE, RES_DATE, SUCC_FLAG, BANK_CODE, BANK_ACCOUNT, BANK_PEOPLE_ID, BANK_USER_NAME, CONTRACT_NUM, CHARGE_SEQ, REQ_AMOUNT, RES_AMOUNT, CHARGE_FEE, TRY_CNT, RECORD_DATE, RECHARGE_RESULT, RECHARGE_DATE, CMS_START_DATE, CMS_TYPE, RCG_SEQ, ADMIN_ID, KT_RES_CD, KT_RES_MSG ) SELECT CMS_SEQ, REQ_DATE, REQ_NO, RES_CODE, RES_DATE, SUCC_FLAG, BANK_CODE, BANK_ACCOUNT, BANK_PEOPLE_ID, BANK_USER_NAME, CONTRACT_NUM, CHARGE_SEQ, REQ_AMOUNT, RES_AMOUNT, CHARGE_FEE, TRY_CNT, RECORD_DATE, RECHARGE_RESULT, RECHARGE_DATE, CMS_START_DATE, CMS_TYPE, RCG_SEQ, ADMIN_ID, KT_RES_CD, KT_RES_MSG FROM PPS_RCG_REAL_CMS A WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM PPS_RCG_REAL_CMS@DL_CAN WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = A.CONTRACT_NUM )

/*canPpTransferMapper.insertCanPpsRcgRealCmsSetup*/ INSERT INTO PPS_RCG_REAL_CMS_SETUP@DL_CAN ( CONTRACT_NUM, SUBSCRIBER_NO, CMS_BANK_CODE, CMS_ACCOUNT, CMS_USER_NAME, CMS_USER_SSN, CMS_AGREE_FLAG, CMS_CHARGE, CMS_TRY_REMAINS, RECORD_DATE, CMS_CHARGE_TYPE, CMS_CHARGE_DATE, CMS_CHARGE_MONTH, ADMIN_ID ) SELECT CONTRACT_NUM, SUBSCRIBER_NO, CMS_BANK_CODE, CMS_ACCOUNT, CMS_USER_NAME, CMS_USER_SSN, CMS_AGREE_FLAG, CMS_CHARGE, CMS_TRY_REMAINS, RECORD_DATE, CMS_CHARGE_TYPE, CMS_CHARGE_DATE, CMS_CHARGE_MONTH, ADMIN_ID FROM PPS_RCG_REAL_CMS_SETUP A WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM PPS_RCG_REAL_CMS_SETUP@DL_CAN WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = A.CONTRACT_NUM )

/*canPpTransferMapper.insertCanPpsRealPayinfoCmsLog*/ INSERT INTO PPS_REAL_PAYINFO_CMS_LOG@DL_CAN ( CMS_SEQ, CONTRACT_NUM, BANK_CODE, BANK_ACCOUNT, BANK_PEOPLE_ID, BANK_USER_NAME, SUBSCRIBER_NO, TRACE_NUM, PROC_DATE, CMS_TYPE, MSG_TYPE, TASK_TYPE, REQ_DATE, REQ_NO, RES_CODE, RES_DATE, SUCC_FLAG, CHARGE_SEQ, REQ_AMOUNT, RES_AMOUNT, CHARGE_FEE, TRY_CNT, RECORD_DATE, RECHARGE_RESULT, RECHARGE_DATE, ADMIN_ID, HIS_DT ) SELECT CMS_SEQ, CONTRACT_NUM, BANK_CODE, BANK_ACCOUNT, BANK_PEOPLE_ID, BANK_USER_NAME, SUBSCRIBER_NO, TRACE_NUM, PROC_DATE, CMS_TYPE, MSG_TYPE, TASK_TYPE, REQ_DATE, REQ_NO, RES_CODE, RES_DATE, SUCC_FLAG, CHARGE_SEQ, REQ_AMOUNT, RES_AMOUNT, CHARGE_FEE, TRY_CNT, RECORD_DATE, RECHARGE_RESULT, RECHARGE_DATE, ADMIN_ID, HIS_DT FROM PPS_REAL_PAYINFO_CMS_LOG A WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM PPS_REAL_PAYINFO_CMS_LOG@DL_CAN WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = A.CONTRACT_NUM )

/*canPpTransferMapper.insertCanPpsVirAccountKibnet*/ INSERT INTO PPS_VIR_ACCOUNT_KIBNET@DL_CAN ( SEQ, TX_DATE, TX_TIME, JM_SEQ_NO, JM_SEQ_NO_SCH, JM_TYPE, JM_CODE, SCH_GUBUN, REQ_GUBUN, MALL_CODE, SUB_MALL, YG_BANK_CODE1, YG_BANK_CODE2, TELLER, PAY_GUBUN, PAY_MEDIA_GUBUN, PAY_CUST_NAME, PAY_BANK_CODE1, PAY_BANK_CODE2, PAY_BANK_NAME, PAY_BRANCH_NAME, PAY_TOT_AMT, PAY_CASH, PAY_CHECK, PAY_MEDIA, REM_CUST_NAME, REM_BANK_CD, REM_BANK_ACCOUNT, CURRENCY, KIB_CD, KIB_MSG, ENTER_DATE, SETTLE_DATE, VACC_NO, USER_TYPE, CONTRACT_NUM, SUBSCRIBER_NO, AGENT_ID, CANCEL_FLAG, CANCEL_DATE, RES_CD, RES_MSG, RES_STATUS, RES_DT, STATUS, RET_CD, RET_MSG, RET_DATE ) SELECT SEQ, TX_DATE, TX_TIME, JM_SEQ_NO, JM_SEQ_NO_SCH, JM_TYPE, JM_CODE, SCH_GUBUN, REQ_GUBUN, MALL_CODE, SUB_MALL, YG_BANK_CODE1, YG_BANK_CODE2, TELLER, PAY_GUBUN, PAY_MEDIA_GUBUN, PAY_CUST_NAME, PAY_BANK_CODE1, PAY_BANK_CODE2, PAY_BANK_NAME, PAY_BRANCH_NAME, PAY_TOT_AMT, PAY_CASH, PAY_CHECK, PAY_MEDIA, REM_CUST_NAME, REM_BANK_CD, REM_BANK_ACCOUNT, CURRENCY, KIB_CD, KIB_MSG, ENTER_DATE, SETTLE_DATE, VACC_NO, USER_TYPE, CONTRACT_NUM, SUBSCRIBER_NO, AGENT_ID, CANCEL_FLAG, CANCEL_DATE, RES_CD, RES_MSG, RES_STATUS, RES_DT, STATUS, RET_CD, RET_MSG, RET_DATE FROM PPS_VIR_ACCOUNT_KIBNET A WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM PPS_VIR_ACCOUNT_KIBNET@DL_CAN WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = A.CONTRACT_NUM )

/*canPpTransferMapper.insertCanPpsRcgRemoteReqLog*/ INSERT INTO PPS_RCG_REMOTE_REQ_LOG@DL_CAN ( REQ_SEQ, BATCH_SEQ, IN_REQ_MODE, IN_REQ_TYPE, IN_REQ_SEQ, SERVICE_ACCOUNT, SERVICE_NUMBER, PIN, RECHARGE, REMARK, REQ_NUMBER, AGENT_ID, ACCESS_ID, RECORD_DATE, IN_REQ_DATE, IN_REQ_CD, IN_REQ_MSG, IN_RES_DATE, IN_RES_CD, IN_RES_MSG, IN_RES_VALUE, TRANSFER_DTTM ) SELECT REQ_SEQ, BATCH_SEQ, IN_REQ_MODE, IN_REQ_TYPE, IN_REQ_SEQ, SERVICE_ACCOUNT, SERVICE_NUMBER, PIN, RECHARGE, REMARK, REQ_NUMBER, AGENT_ID, ACCESS_ID, RECORD_DATE, IN_REQ_DATE, IN_REQ_CD, IN_REQ_MSG, IN_RES_DATE, IN_RES_CD, IN_RES_MSG, IN_RES_VALUE, SYSDATE FROM PPS_RCG_REMOTE_REQ_LOG A WHERE REQ_SEQ = #{reqSeq} AND TO_CHAR(IN_REQ_DATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') = #{inReqDt} AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM PPS_RCG_REMOTE_REQ_LOG@DL_CAN WHERE REQ_SEQ = A.REQ_SEQ AND TO_CHAR(IN_REQ_DATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') = TO_CHAR(A.IN_REQ_DATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'))
mapper.update: /*canPpTransferMapper.updatePpsCustomer*/ UPDATE PPS_CUSTOMER SET VIR_ACCOUNT_ID = '' , CMS_ACCOUNT = '' , CMS_USER_NAME = CASE WHEN CMS_USER_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN '이관고객' ELSE '' END , CMS_USER_SSN = CASE WHEN CMS_USER_SSN IS NOT NULL THEN CRYPTO_AES256.ENC_AES(SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(CMS_USER_SSN), 1, 7) || '******') ELSE '' END , AD_NAME = '' , AD_SSN = '' , AD_ADDRESS = '' WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum}

/*canPpTransferMapper.updatePpsCustomerHist*/ UPDATE PPS_CUSTOMER_HIST SET VIR_ACCOUNT_ID = '' , CMS_ACCOUNT = '' , CMS_USER_NAME = CASE WHEN CMS_USER_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN '이관고객' ELSE '' END , CMS_USER_SSN = CASE WHEN CMS_USER_SSN IS NOT NULL THEN CRYPTO_AES256.ENC_AES(SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(CMS_USER_SSN), 1, 7) || '******') ELSE '' END , AD_NAME = '' , AD_SSN = '' , AD_ADDRESS = '' WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum}

/*canPpTransferMapper.updatePpsAgentStmOpen*/ UPDATE PPS_AGENT_STM_OPEN SET SUBSCRIBER_NO = '00000000000' , SUB_LINK_NAME = CASE WHEN SUB_LINK_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN '이관고객' ELSE '' END , USER_SSN = CASE WHEN USER_SSN IS NOT NULL THEN CRYPTO_AES256.ENC_AES(SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(USER_SSN), 1, 7) || '******') ELSE '' END WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum}

/*canPpTransferMapper.updatePpsRcgRealCms*/ UPDATE PPS_RCG_REAL_CMS SET BANK_ACCOUNT = '' , BANK_PEOPLE_ID = CASE WHEN BANK_PEOPLE_ID IS NOT NULL THEN CRYPTO_AES256.ENC_AES(SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(BANK_PEOPLE_ID), 1, 7) || '******') ELSE '' END , BANK_USER_NAME = CASE WHEN BANK_USER_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN '이관고객' ELSE '' END WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum}

/*canPpTransferMapper.updatePpsRcgRealCmsSetup*/ UPDATE PPS_RCG_REAL_CMS_SETUP SET SUBSCRIBER_NO = '00000000000' , CMS_ACCOUNT = '' , CMS_USER_NAME = CASE WHEN CMS_USER_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN '이관고객' ELSE '' END , CMS_USER_SSN = CASE WHEN CMS_USER_SSN IS NOT NULL THEN CRYPTO_AES256.ENC_AES(SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(CMS_USER_SSN), 1, 7) || '******') ELSE '' END WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum}

/*canPpTransferMapper.updatePpsRealPayinfoCmsLog*/ UPDATE PPS_REAL_PAYINFO_CMS_LOG SET BANK_ACCOUNT = '' , BANK_PEOPLE_ID = CASE WHEN BANK_PEOPLE_ID IS NOT NULL THEN CRYPTO_AES256.ENC_AES(SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(BANK_PEOPLE_ID), 1, 7) || '******') ELSE '' END , BANK_USER_NAME = CASE WHEN BANK_USER_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN '이관고객' ELSE '' END , SUBSCRIBER_NO = '00000000000' WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum}

/*canPpTransferMapper.updatePpsVirAccountKibnet*/ UPDATE PPS_VIR_ACCOUNT_KIBNET SET REM_CUST_NAME = CASE WHEN REM_CUST_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN '이관고객' ELSE '' END , REM_BANK_ACCOUNT = '' , VACC_NO = '' , SUBSCRIBER_NO = '00000000000' WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum}

/*canPpTransferMapper.updatePpsRcgRemoteReqLog*/ UPDATE PPS_RCG_REMOTE_REQ_LOG SET SERVICE_NUMBER = CASE WHEN SERVICE_NUMBER IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(TRANSLATE(SERVICE_NUMBER, '1234567890', ' ')) IS NULL THEN LPAD('0', LENGTH(SERVICE_NUMBER), '0') ELSE SERVICE_NUMBER END , REQ_NUMBER = CASE WHEN REQ_NUMBER IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(TRANSLATE(REQ_NUMBER, '1234567890', ' ')) IS NULL THEN LPAD('0', LENGTH(REQ_NUMBER), '0') ELSE REQ_NUMBER END , ACCESS_ID = CASE WHEN ACCESS_ID IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(TRANSLATE(ACCESS_ID, '1234567890', ' ')) IS NULL THEN LPAD('0', LENGTH(ACCESS_ID), '0') ELSE ACCESS_ID END , PIN = LPAD('0', LENGTH(PIN), '0') WHERE REQ_SEQ = #{reqSeq} AND TO_CHAR(IN_REQ_DATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') = #{inReqDt}
mapper.delete: /*canPpTransferMapper.deletePpsRcgRemoteReqLog*/ DELETE FROM PPS_RCG_REMOTE_REQ_LOG WHERE REQ_SEQ = #{reqSeq} AND TO_CHAR(IN_REQ_DATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') = #{inReqDt}
/*canPpTransferMapper.deleteCanPpsRcgRemoteReqLog*/ DELETE FROM PPS_RCG_REMOTE_REQ_LOG@DL_CAN WHERE REQ_SEQ = #{reqSeq} AND TO_CHAR(IN_REQ_DATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') = #{inReqDt}
